notes: Updated design criteria so design review must explicitly check weed removal across redundant labels, renderer-demo prose, and unnecessary framing/chrome.
Removed song detail summary and chartNotes from the detail header because the representative data contained renderer/sample explanations rather than user-facing song content.
Removed the lead-sheet preview card frame, shadow, and separate paper surface so the chart reads as part of the detail page.
Restored article padding and removed the duplicate chart divider line.
Adjusted lead-sheet row spacing and mark positions so 2/4, D.S., and Fine remain visible after tightening.
